title: The Bridge Too Far
premise_summary: Crocodile pretends to be a bridge
cover_description: A crocodile rolled into a wobbly tube with a mouse peeking out of his open mouth, looking unimpressed.
script:
[TITLE: The Bridge Too Far]
[AGE: 6-8]
[VOICES: high_pitch_cartoon, comedic_villain, young_sweet]
[COMEDY_TYPE: misunderstanding]

[SETUP]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: curious, excited] Ooooh! What’s that long green thing stretched over the river? [STING: buildup_short]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: confident, bluster] That, my tiny friend, is MY magnificent bridge! [STING: villain_dramatic]
[SWEET] [DELIVERY: deadpan, unbothered] It’s just you lying across the water. [STING: sweet_eyeroll]
[/SETUP]

[BEAT_1]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: suspicious, tentative] Wait… if I step on you, will I get to the other side? [STING: tiptoe]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: triumphant] Of course! I am the sturdiest bridge in the land! [STING: musical_flourish]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: panicked] EEEP! Why are you wobbling like a bowl of jelly? [STING: mouse_panic]
[/BEAT_1]

[BEAT_2]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: defensive, scrambling] I am NOT wobbling! I am… flexing for strength! [STING: slide_whistle]
[SWEET] [DELIVERY: deadpan, pointed] You’re rolling into a tube. [STING: sweet_pause]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: outraged, loud] YOU’RE A TUBE! I’M STUCK IN YOUR MOUTH! [STING: big_crash]
[/BEAT_2]

[BEAT_3]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: desperate, bluster] Ahem! This is my *bridge maintenance* position! [STING: villain_fail]
[MOUSE] [DELIVERY: calm gotcha, quiet] So… bridges usually have legs? [STING: silence]
[SWEET] [DELIVERY: devastating, deadpan] No. But crocodiles do. [STING: whoosh]
[/BEAT_3]

[BUTTON]
[CROC] [DELIVERY: deflated, desperate] [PUNCHLINE]I am a very bad bridge… and a very full crocodile.[/PUNCHLINE] [STING: deflation]
[/BUTTON]

[COVER: A crocodile rolled into a wobbly tube with a mouse peeking out of his open mouth, looking unimpressed.]
[PREMISE: Crocodile pretends to be a bridge]
host_intro: Tonight, Boomy lies across a river and calls himself a bridge. He is not a bridge.
host_outro: Boomy is still rolled into a tube. Sunny says that is normal for bridges.
